attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
WI_NCR.BATCH_ID,
COALESCE(WI_NCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,-999) ,
WI_NCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
WI_NCR.ACCOUNT_CLASS,
WI_NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,
WI_NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT,
COALESCE(WI_NCR.ADJUSTMENT_ID,-9999) ,
WI_NCR.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
WI_NCR.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
WI_NCR.AMOUNT,
COALESCE(WI_NCR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,-999),
COALESCE(WI_NCR.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,-999),
WI_NCR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
WI_NCR.COGS_PERCENT,
WI_NCR.COMMENTS,
WI_NCR.CONTEXT,
WI_NCR.CREATED_BY,
WI_NCR.CREATION_DATE,
COALESCE(WI_NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,-9999),
COALESCE(WI_NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,-9999),
COALESCE(WI_NCR.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,-9999),
WI_NCR.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
WI_NCR.EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
WI_NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE,
WI_NCR.FISCAL_ID,
WI_NCR.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
WI_NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
WI_NCR.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
WI_NCR.GLOBAL_NAME ,
WI_NCR.GL_DATE,
WI_NCR.GL_POSTED_DATE,
WI_NCR.GROUPING_ID,
WI_NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
WI_NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
WI_NCR.INVOICE_PERCENT,
WI_NCR.INVOICING_RULE_ID,
WI_NCR.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
WI_NCR.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
WI_NCR.LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
WI_NCR.LINE_SEQ_ID,
WI_NCR.LINE_TYPE,
WI_NCR.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
COALESCE(WI_NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID,-9999),
/* WI_NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID, */
CASE WHEN WI_NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID	IS NULL OR WI_NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID = 0 THEN -9999
	ELSE WI_NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID
END AS 	ORDER_LINE_ID,
WI_NCR.ORDER_NUMBER,
/* WI_NCR.ORG_ID, */
CASE 	 WHEN  (WI_NCR.ORG_ID IS NULL AND WI_NCR.GLOBAL_NAME ='OOD') THEN 112 
	 ELSE WI_NCR.ORG_ID 
END ORG_ID,
WI_NCR.LINE_PERCENT,
WI_NCR.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
WI_NCR.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
WI_NCR.QUOTA_FLAG,
WI_NCR.REASON_CODE,
WI_NCR.REBATE_AMOUNT,
WI_NCR.REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
COALESCE(WI_NCR.REQUEST_ID,-999),
WI_NCR.RULE_START_DATE,
COALESCE(WI_NCR.SALESREP_ID,-999) ,
COALESCE(WI_NCR.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,-999),
WI_NCR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
COALESCE(WI_NCR.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,-999),
COALESCE(WI_NCR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,-999),
WI_NCR.SOURCE_TYPE,
WI_NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,
COALESCE(WI_NCR.TERRITORY_ID,-999),
WI_NCR.TRANSACTION_DATE,
WI_NCR.TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE,
WI_NCR.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
ROW_NUMBER () OVER ( ORDER BY WI_NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,WI_NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY )+COALESCE(MT_DRVD.MAX_KEY,0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
WI_NCR.TRX_DATE,
WI_NCR.TRX_NAME,
WI_NCR.TRX_NUMBER,
WI_NCR.TRX_TYPE,
WI_NCR.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
WI_NCR.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
WI_NCR.CREATE_DATETIME,
WI_NCR.ACTION_CODE,
WI_NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
WI_NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
WI_NCR.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
WI_NCR.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
WI_NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
WI_NCR.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
FROM
(
SELECT
BATCH_ID,
ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
ACCOUNT_CLASS,
ACCOUNT_CODE,
ACCTD_AMOUNT,
ADJUSTMENT_ID,
ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
AMOUNT,
BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
COGS_PERCENT,
COMMENTS,
CONTEXT,
CREATED_BY,
CREATION_DATE,
CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
EXTRACT_TYPE,
FISCAL_ID,
FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
GES_UPDATE_DATE,
GLOBAL_NAME,
GL_DATE,
GL_POSTED_DATE,
GROUPING_ID,
INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
INVOICE_PERCENT,
INVOICING_RULE_ID,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
LINE_SEQ_ID,
LINE_TYPE,
LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
ORDER_HEADER_ID,
ORDER_LINE_ID,
ORDER_NUMBER,
ORG_ID,
LINE_PERCENT,
PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
QUOTA_FLAG,
REASON_CODE,
REBATE_AMOUNT,
REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
REQUEST_ID,
RULE_START_DATE,
SALESREP_ID,
SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,
SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
SOURCE_TYPE,
SPLIT_PERCENT,
TERRITORY_ID,
TRANSACTION_DATE,
TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE,
TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
TRX_DATE,
TRX_NAME,
TRX_NUMBER,
TRX_TYPE,
UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
CREATE_DATETIME,
ACTION_CODE,
DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
DV_TRANSACTION_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE     ,
SALES_REP_NUMBER,
SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_TRX_OOD

UNION ALL

SELECT
BATCH_ID,
ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
ACCOUNT_CLASS,
ACCOUNT_CODE,
ACCTD_AMOUNT,
ADJUSTMENT_ID,
ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
AMOUNT,
BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
COGS_PERCENT,
COMMENTS,
CONTEXT,
CREATED_BY,
CREATION_DATE,
CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
EXTRACT_TYPE,
FISCAL_ID,
FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
GES_UPDATE_DATE,
GLOBAL_NAME,
GL_DATE,
GL_POSTED_DATE,
GROUPING_ID,
INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
INVOICE_PERCENT,
INVOICING_RULE_ID,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
LINE_SEQ_ID,
LINE_TYPE,
LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
ORDER_HEADER_ID,
ORDER_LINE_ID,
ORDER_NUMBER,
ORG_ID,
LINE_PERCENT,
PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
QUOTA_FLAG,
REASON_CODE,
REBATE_AMOUNT,
REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
REQUEST_ID,
RULE_START_DATE,
SALESREP_ID,
SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,
SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
SOURCE_TYPE,
SPLIT_PERCENT,
TERRITORY_ID,
TRANSACTION_DATE,
TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE,
TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
TRX_DATE,
TRX_NAME,
TRX_NUMBER,
TRX_TYPE,
UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
CREATE_DATETIME,
ACTION_CODE,
DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
DV_TRANSACTION_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE     ,
SALES_REP_NUMBER,
SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_TRX_OOD
) WI_NCR  ,
( SEL MAX(MT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT) AS MAX_KEY
   FROM
     (  SELECT MAX(BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV WHERE BK_SS_CD='OOD'                    
		UNION ALL
		SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_TRX_RT_OOD 
      )MT
) MT_DRVD
